message: Two cargo vans slowed to 11 km/h after mud accumulation on Route_Alpha northbound lane.
Checkpoint bridge reopened at 19:38; 3 light vehicles crossed without axle stress warnings.
Water depth increased from 18cm to 31cm over 12 minutes near Connector-4.
Insulin cold box delayed 9 minutes at warehouse gate; alternate medical corridor requested.
Unverified crowd report: 14-18 people blocking Route_Gamma near Market-3 checkpoint.
